name: Queensland Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter with oil in a large pot.
2. Add cabbage, onion, broth, and thyme. Simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add mushrooms, tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Stir, cover, and simmer until just tender (approximately 10-15 minutes).
4. Add the additional tablespoon of butter and parsley.
